ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device or sensor */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the device or sensor */,
  "volttron_point_name" TEXT /* Volttron point name of the device or sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inchesOfWater, degreesFahrenheit) */,
  "unit_details" TEXT /* Unit details (e.g., -0.20 to 5.00) */,
  "bacnet_object_type" TEXT /* BACnet object type (e.g., analogInput) */,
  "property" TEXT /* Property of the device or sensor (e.g., presentValue) */,
  "writable" INTEGER /* Whether the device or sensor is writable */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index of the device or sensor */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device or sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, pressure) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the location */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the building */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location (e.g., '40.7128, -74.0060') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device or sensor that took the reading */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the reading was taken */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time at which the reading was taken */,
  "alarm_status" INTEGER /* Whether the reading triggered an alarm */,
  "alarm_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification has been sent for the alarm */,
  "alarm_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alarm has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alarm was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., building manager, maintenance personnel, security officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
